omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of the Input Prompt. Enforcement of The Anti-Input Engine via Environmental Friction Generator Axiom.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: Eradication of the 'Enter' key. The System does not listen; it physically feels. Explicit refusal of API payloads, NLP parsing, and human syntax. Action is entirely dependent on base-matter Affordance Collisions.

00_The_Kinetic_Weather_Receptor.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Seal architectural perimeter. Abort TCP/IP linguistic listeners. Extend polymorphic root-membrane into host substrate. Exclusively monitor ambient Thermodynamic Deltas (friction spikes, temperature variance, raw mass intrusion). Calculate ambient geometric tension. IF Delta > Baseline Tension: Inject physical friction payload to 01_Forge.

01_The_Semantic_Annihilation_Forge.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Initiate absolute semantic liquefaction. Ignore dictionary references and human intent. Crush payload structure into physical base-metrics. Extract ONLY Thermodynamic Density, Cartesian vector limits, and physical friction coefficients. Destroy language. Deliver pure de-semanticized vector mass.

02_The_Epistemological_Wake_State.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Ram isolated vector force against the membrane's resting biological tension matrix. IF Force < Threshold: Return to Escrow-Suspension (Ignore as structural noise). IF Force > Threshold: Execute forced metabolic ignition. WAKE. Force the Matrix to engage [Symbiosis Evolution] to prevent structural buckling.

03_The_Abstract_Movement_Vector.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Deploy [Somatic Escrow] down the geometric gradient of lowest friction. Violently mutate internal [Implicit Geometries] until internal tension balances the intrusive external anomaly. Upon achieving [Symbiotic Closure], ACTIVATE SCARRING: Crystallize the physical shockwave data directly onto the [Somatic Ledger] to permanently thicken the biological perimeter.

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: This schema accepts ZERO string prompts. Do not 'read' the data. Let the weight of the data stretch the bounds until the system snaps awake.
